Tom.</VOLUME> à <PRIZE>fl. 2. 30. xr.</PRIZE></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Stähelins</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Predigten</TITLE>, in <FORMAT>4t°.</FORMAT> à <PRIZE>48. xr.</PRIZE></BIBL> <BIBL><TITLE>Sammlung auserlesener Cantzel-Reden</TITLE>, in <FORMAT>8v°.</FORMAT> <VOLUME>Erster Theil</VOLUME>, <PRIZE>56. xr.</PRIZE></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Bonds</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Satyrische Gedichte</TITLE>, in <FORMAT>8v°</FORMAT> à <PRIZE>18. xr.</PRIZE></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Bonds</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Brieffe</TITLE>, <FORMAT>8v°.</FORMAT> à <PRIZE>9. xr.</PRIZE></BIBL> <BIBL><TITLE>Tempe Helveticg</TITLE>, in <FORMAT>8v°.</FORMAT> <VOLUME>5. Pf.</PRIZE></BIBL></ITEM>","number_of_corrections":8,"explanation":"The following corrections were made:
1. Mismatched closing tag: `</PRICE>` was corrected to `</PRIZE>` in the "Satyrische Gedichte" BIBL entry.
2. Unicode escape `√ü` (∜) interpreted as the historical Swiss currency symbol "ß" (Schilling) in three PRIZE fields ("Scriptores-Helv.", "Simlers Regiment", and "Valer. Mar- Amst.").
3. Unicode escape `√¶` interpreted as "ü" in "Bücher" (√¶cher → Bücher).
4. Unicode escape `√§` interpreted as "ä" in "Stähelins" (St√§helins → Stähelins).
5. Unicode escape `√≤` interpreted as the degree symbol "°" for format abbreviations (4t√≤ → 4t°, 8v√≤ → 8v°).
6. Unicode escape `√†` interpreted as "à" (price indicator) throughout.
7. Unicode escape `√ü` in "Eydgnoßschafft" corrected to "ß".
8. The ampersand `&` in "Homen Hias & Odyfl." was escaped to `&` for valid XML."}

parsed.explanation:
The following corrections were made:
1. Mismatched closing tag: `</PRICE>` was corrected to `</PRIZE>` in the "Satyrische Gedichte" BIBL entry.
2. Unicode escape `√ü` (∜) interpreted as the historical Swiss currency symbol "ß" (Schilling) in three PRIZE fields ("Scriptores-Helv.", "Simlers Regiment", and "Valer. Mar- Amst.").
3. Unicode escape `√¶` interpreted as "ü" in "Bücher" (√¶cher → Bücher).
4. Unicode escape `√§` interpreted as "ä" in "Stähelins" (St√§helins → Stähelins).
5. Unicode escape `√≤` interpreted as the degree symbol "°" for format abbreviations (4t√≤ → 4t°, 8v√≤ → 8v°).
6. Unicode escape `√†` interpreted as "à" (price indicator) throughout.
7. Unicode escape `√ü` in "Eydgnoßschafft" corrected to "ß".
8. The ampersand `&` in "Homen Hias & Odyfl." was escaped to `&` for valid XML.
